mapper.insert: INSERT INTO federated_analysis_task (task_name, project_id, source_sql, task_state, task_param, created_by) VALUES (#{taskName}, #{projectId}, #{sourceSql}, 0, #{taskParam}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE federated_analysis_task SET rewritten_sql = #{rewrittenSql} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO federated_analysis_result (task_id, result_type, result_data, result_file, column_metadata, row_count) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{resultType}, #{resultData}, #{resultFile}, #{columnMetadata}, #{rowCount})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM federated_analysis_result WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO federated_analysis_datasource (source_name, source_type, source_config, created_by) VALUES (#{sourceName}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceConfig}, #{createdBy})
